channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Squier Sonic Bronco Bass 2023 - Present - Black — $120
item.description:
$120 · Good · Ember's Gear Outlet

This is a great first bass, especially for guitarists. The instrument is in great physical condition, with no signs of needing a set up anytime soon. There is a slight buzzing noise when plugged in, but can still be used for small gigs and practicing. The buzzing probably has a simple solution, but I never chose to fix it

item.title: Dingwall Super J4 2008 — $5,346.95
item.description:
$5,346.95 · Very Good · Warren's Shop

2008 Dingwall Custom Shop Canadian Super J4 - Daphne Blue - Sheldon Hand-Rewound Pickup & 3 PickguardsDescription:
Up for sale is a stunning 2008 Custom Shop Canadian-made Dingwall Super J4 in timeless Daphne Blue. This bass masterfully merges classic vintage J-bass ergonomics with Sheldon Dingwall's world-renowned multiscale engineering.This specific instrument holds incredible player and collector status due to custom factory work performed personally by Sheldon Dingwall.Pro-Shop Modifications & Provenance:

  • Sheldon Hand-Rewound Pickup: The bridge pickup was sent back and personally hand-rewound by Sheldon to unlock massive clarity, perfect punch, and a completely balanced note-to-note string response.
  • Autographed Headstock: Personally signed by Sheldon Dingwall on the back of the headstock.
  • New Factory Electronics: Freshly serviced and upgraded with a brand-new factory-original 4-way rotary pickup selector switch for silent, crisp tonal options.

3-in-1 Aesthetic Value Package:
This bass ships with three distinct pickguards custom-fit to this exact multiscale layout, letting you swap styles in minutes:

  1. Aged White Pearloid (Elegant, classic look)
  2. 4-Ply Tortoiseshell (Traditional vintage vibe)
  3. 3-Ply Solid Black (Sleek, modern look)

Specifications:

  • Year: 2008
  • Model: Super J4 (Handmade in Canada)
  • Finish: Daphne Blue
  • Scale Length: Multi-scale fanned fret system (34.25" down to 32") for uniform tension and a tight, articulate low-frequency response.
  • Electronics: Passive Master Volume, Master Tone, and the newly replaced 4-way Rotary Selector (Bridge, Series, Parallel, Neck).
  • Condition: Excellent player condition. Minor play wear as expected on an instrument of this vintage, but meticulously cared for. Frets are clean with plenty of life left.
  • Inclusions: Includes a premium gig bag, the original paperwork/provenance, and all three pickguards.

International Shipping Note:
Ships from Canada. For US and international buyers, please be aware that any import duties, taxes, or customs clearance fees charged by your country's border agencies are the sole responsibility of the buyer.

item.title: Fender Highway One Jazz Bass 2007 - Transparent Wine Red — $1,399
item.description:
$1,399 · Excellent · The Bass Shop

Product details:

These are great, U.S. built basses that sell for hundreds less than a typical American Standard Fender. This bass has seen very little playing time and comes with a Fender gig bag and has been upgraded with Lollar Blade Style Jazz Pickups and a Leo Quan Badass II bridge, roughly $300 in improvements.

WEIGHT:  9 lbs.  6 ozs.    

SERIAL #:  Z6267518

DATE:  2007

NUT WIDTH:  1 1/2"    

COLOR:  Transparent Wine Satin Lacquer

BODY/NECK/FINGERBOARD:  Alder/ Maple/ Rosewood Fingerboard  

PICKUPS/ELECTRONICS:  Lollar B.S. (Blade Style) Jazz Pickups/ Passive Vol., Vol., Tone

CONDITION:  Excellent   

CASE:  Fender Gig Bag

item.title: Fender Bitsa Jazz Bass - Charcoal Frost Metallic — $887.33
item.description:
$887.33 · Very Good · BassBros

We do love a Bitsa bass, they can sound great and this is no exception! This one has a Fender American Performer maple neck, Warmoth body, Fender lightweight tuners, Gotoh bridge and Lindy Fralin Split Jazz standard wind pickups. It's in very good condition but does have a larger ding on front/side of lower horn. We have checked the trussrod and electronics and everything functions perfectly as it should.

- Part Exchange Welcome -

Serial Number - US23056328
Colour - Charcoal Frost Metallic
Body Finish - Gloss
Body Wood  - Alder
Neck Finish - Satin
Neck Wood - Maple
Fretboard - Rosewood
Frets - 20
Scale Length - 34"
Weight - 9lb 11oz / 4.4kg
Electronics - Passive
Pickups - Lindy Fralin Split Jazz standard wind pickups
Gigbag/Hardcase - N/A

item.title: Fender Affinity Series Active Jazz Bass Guitar, Mystic Sea Foam Green (USED) — $399.99
item.description:
$399.99 · Excellent · Centre Music House

Our Notes: In Excellent condition. There's a scratch on the back of the guitar. It's located on the left lower bout and about 1.5" long. There's also a tiny ding about halfway down the back of the neck. The action is at a comfortably low height and all of the hardware is mint! This one is ready to go!

An excellent entry point into the storied Fender® family, the Squier® Affinity Series® Active Jazz Bass® brings iconic style and classic tone to today's up-and-coming bassist. This J Bass® offers a number of player-friendly features including a thin, lightweight body and a slim, comfortable "C"-shaped neck with retro block inlays and vintage-style open-gear tuners for precise, reliable tuning. Equipped with two Squier Noiseless™ J Bass pickups driven by an active 9V 2-band preamp, this bass delivers a broad range of punchy, versatile tones — making it a great choice for players at any level.

Product Features:

  • Thin and lightweight body
  • Slim “C”-shaped neck with block inlays
  • Squier Noiseless pickups
  • Active 9-volt preamp with controls for volume, blend, and bass/treble boost/cut
  • 4-saddle bass bridge

Product Specs:

BODY 

  • BODY MATERIAL Poplar
  • BODY FINISH Gloss Polyurethane
  • BODY MATERIAL Poplar
  • BODY SHAPE Jazz Bass®

ELECTRONICS 

  • BRIDGE PICKUP Squier® Ceramic Noiseless™ Jazz Bass®
  • CONTROLS Master Volume, Blend Knob, Active Bass/Treble Boost/Cut (Stacked Control)
  • NECK PICKUP Squier® Ceramic Noiseless™ Jazz Bass®
  • PICKUP CONFIGURATON SS
  • SWITCHING None

GENERAL 

  • COLOR Mystic Sea Foam Green
  • ORIENTATION Right-Hand
  • PLATFORM Squier Basses
  • SERIES Affinity Series®
  • BASS WEIGHT 8lbs 14.3oz

HARDWARE 

  • BRIDGE 4-Saddle Standard
  • CONTROL KNOBS Black Plastic
  • HARDWARE FINISH Chrome
  • NECK PLATE 4-Bolt Squier®
  • PICKGUARD 3-Ply White
  • STRAP BUTTONS Standard
  • STRING TREES Vintage-Style Disc
  • TUNING MACHINES Vintage-Style

NECK 

  • FINGERBOARD MATERIAL Indian Laurel
  • FINGERBOARD RADIUS 9.5" (241 mm)
  • NECK CONSTRUCTION Bolt-On
  • NECK FINISH Satin Urethane
  • NECK MATERIAL Maple
  • NECK SHAPE "C" Shape
  • NUMBER OF FRETS 20
  • NUT MATERIAL Synthetic Bone
  • NUT WIDTH 1.5" (38.1 mm)
  • POSITION INLAYS Pearloid Block
  • SIDE DOTS White
  • STRING NUT Synthetic Bone
  • TRUSS ROD Single Action, Head Adjust

MEASUREMENTS 

  • FRET SIZE Medium Jumbo
  • SCALE LENGTH 34" (864 mm)

item.title: Fender American Original 60s Precision Bass 2019 - Lake Placid Blue — $2,061.13
item.description:
$2,061.13 · Good · BassBros

Here we have a Fender American Original '60s Precision Bass in the stunning Lake Placid Blue finish. This bass is in good overall condition overall with lots of chips in lacquer across the body and dents and marks throughout. There are also some marks around bridge from the pickup cover. Included is the original hardcase.

- Part Exchange Welcome -

Serial Number - V1964113
Year - 2019
Colour - Lake Placid Blue
Body Finish - Gloss
Body Wood - Alder
Neck Finish - Gloss
Neck Wood - Maple
Fretboard - Rosewood
Frets - 20
Scale Length - 34"
Weight - 8lb 9oz / 3.9kg
Electronics - Passive
Pickups - Original Fender Pure Vintage '63
Gigbag/Hardcase - Original Hardcase

item.title: Fender American Original '50s Precision Bass 2017 - White Blonde — $2,234.41
item.description:
$2,234.41 · Excellent · BassBros

Here we have sweet example of a Fender American Original '50s Precision Bass in white blonde. This bass is in excellent condition with light marks and scratches to the finish throughout as well as a few small lacquer chips from the bridge cover holes. This is a real beauty and plays with a low action, fitted with flatwounds! Included is an original hardcase.

- Part Exchange Welcome -

Serial Number - V1747715
Year - 2017
Colour - White Blonde
Body Finish - Gloss
Body Wood - Alder
Neck Finish - Gloss Nitro
Neck Wood - Maple
Fretboard - Maple
Frets - 20
Scale Length - 34"
Weight - 9lb 5oz / 4.2kg
Electronics - Passive
Pickups - Pure Vintage '58 Split Single-Coil
Gigbag/Hardcase - Original Hardcase

item.title: Ukulele bass/ mini upright base. Acoustic / electric — $100
item.description:
$100 · Brand New · Stevegallery

  • I made this from a late-1970s wooden "Lark" Chinese violin
  • Single silicone string
  • Fretless
  • Has a piezo pickup
  • It has a 1/4” mono output jack on the side.
  • Special low-friction permanent material on the nut
  • Original hard-case is included

item.title: BC Rich Eagle Bass EB-857 NJ Series Made in Japan - 1990 — $1,499.99
item.description:
$1,499.99 · Very Good · Northwest Vintage Guitars

Northwest Vintage Guitars presents an uber rare BC Rich Eagle Bass model EB-857 that's been fully serviced including a fret level and dress.  It's ready to go as soon as you get it and tune it up.  These rare NJ Series creations were Made in Japan for the Japanese Domestic market and are very difficlut to source even in Japan.   We were lucky enough to procure one and it doesn't disappoint.  34" scale, 9.5" radius, 8.76 lbs.  The pickups are impressively versatile offering a well balanced tone across all frequencies.  It's an Alder body, a Maple neck and a dark Rosewood fretboard. Comes safely packed and fully insured in the original faux leather BC Rich Gig Bag in the photos.  

The nut measures 1.64", neck depth is .80"-.92" at the 1st and 12th frets respectively.  It's a comfy C profile that most folks prefer.  Freshly strung and accurately intonated with American made 45-105 nickel strings and factory spec action.   The neck is straight, the truss rod turns in both directions, and the relief is currently set for optimum playability.  There are a few scratches and dings as pictured.  It remains in excellent playable condition with no dead spots. 

We only consider local trades in person.  Most questions can be answered with a quick read of our info page.  This item is offered on our website and other online marketing platforms and subject to prior sale.  Please check our website for additional photos.

Buy with confidence. We offer a 7 day money-back return on all used guitars - all our guitars are guaranteed and a full refund will be issued if not received in the condition it was described and pictured.  We do allow “buy & try” preference returns and the buyer pays shipping charges.  Please read our shop policies for more information.   All our guitars are deep cleaned and have received a professional service and setup - an average of a $200 value. You will not get a filthy guitar from us.  If you are particular about cosmetic appearance, please message us for more details.  Additionally, all our guitars are shipped fully insured, and we will assist with any claims that may arise.  See the details on our Storefront.

Please ensure your address and phone number on this platform is the correct shipping address and contact info before purchasing.  We cannot change addresses, phones, or names after purchase.  Some shipping charges may be due before shipping if the actual shipping is more than advertised.  Platform rules prohibit dealing around the platform through messages so please don’t use messages on this platform to ask us to contact you outside of the platform.     

We are located in the Pacific Northwest USA and are exclusively online.

item.title: Fender Musicmaster 1978 - Black — $1,256.24
item.description:
$1,256.24 · Very Good · BassBros

This Fender Musicmaster has great playability and is very comfortable to play due to the shorter scale. These little basses really pack a punch! This one is in very good condition for its age, with lots of signs of use and marks throughout. The finish has gone slightly cloudy. It has had a replacement E string tuner from a Stingray bass, the original is included but not working. Fitted is a replacement pickguard. Everything works as it should including trussrod, electronics.

- Part exchange welcome -

Serial Number - S826246
Year - 1978
Colour - Black
Body Finish - Gloss
Body Wood - Alder
Neck Finish - Gloss
Neck Wood - Maple
Fretboard - Rosewood
Frets - 20
Scale Length - 30"
Weight - 7lb 10oz / 3.5kg
Electronics - Passive
Pickups - Fender
Hardcase/Gigbag - N/A

item.title: Fender Player II Jazz Bass - Black with Maple Fingerboard 2026 — $849.99
item.description:
$849.99 · Brand New · Micarelli Music LLC

Description

Step into the spotlight and experience iconic Fender® sound and style with the Player II Jazz Bass® — a stage-ready bass guitar with contemporary updates to power your performance and inspire your playing.

The Player II Jazz Bass radiates timeless Fender charm, but under the hood, it's primed for today's players. Everything about the neck is designed for fast and fluid playability, from the Modern “C”-profile with silky satin urethane finish on the back to the comfy 9.5”-radius slab rosewood or maple fingerboard with smooth rolled edges and 20 medium jumbo frets. A classic alder body is available in both timeless Fender finishes and never-before-seen colors unearthed from the archives. Player Series Alnico V Single-Coil J bass® pickups offer sweet highs, growling mids and seismic lows that elevate any genre. An adjustable 4-saddle bridge, single-groove steel saddles and open-gear tuners ensure precise tuning stability for the flexibility to explore endless sonic possibilities.

Perfect for crafting your own sound, the Player II Jazz Bass has the looks, tone and feel that only a Fender delivers.

Specifications: 
  • Number of Strings:4
  • Left-/Right-handed:Right-handed
  • Body Shape:Player II Jazz Bass
  • Body Material:Alder
  • Color:Black
  • Body Finish:Gloss Polyester
  • Neck Material:Maple
  • Neck Shape:Modern C
  • Neck Joint:Bolt-on
  • Radius:9.5"
  • Fingerboard Material:Maple
  • Fingerboard Inlay:Dots
  • Number of Frets:20
  • Scale Length:34"
  • Nut Width:1.5"
  • Nut Material:Synthetic Bone
  • Bridge/Tailpiece:4-Saddle Bridge with Single-Groove Steel "Barrel" Saddles
  • Tuners:Standard Open-Gear
  • Neck Pickup:Fender Player Series Alnico V Jazz Single-coil
  • Bridge Pickup:Fender Player Series Alnico V Jazz Single-coil
  • Controls:2 x volume, 1 x tone
  • Strings:Fender 7250M, .045-.105
  • Case/Gig Bag:Sold Separately
  • Manufacturer Part Number:0140482506
Weight: 8lbs 10oz 
Includes Full Set Up Before Shipment 
S/N: MX26050604

item.title: Fender Standard Precision Bass with Rosewood Fretboard 2001 - Black — $600
item.description:
$600 · Very Good · Kentucky Music

This bass has been played a lot. It has one decent chip on the side by the tone knob. (see pictures) We have tried to take as many pictures as possible to show any other blemishes. It plays really nice and is set up with low action. The frets show a little wear, but not bad for a 2001. Please message us with any questions.

From Fender:

Our Standard Precision Bass® guitar features a comfort-contoured alder body, maple neck with a rosewood fingerboard, a single split-coil, hum-canceling pickup and knurled chrome American Precision Bass® knobs. Recent refinements include medium jumbo frets for a more modern feel, and a shielded body cavity for quieter operation.

item.title: Fender MIJ Aerodyne Special Precision Bass 2022 - Present Bright White — $821
item.description:
$821 · Excellent · Briggs's Shop

Barely touched Aerodyne Special Series Precision Bass®. Currently has flatwounds on it. No wear or damage. It still has the protective film on the back control access plate. I just didn't play it (I'm a guitarist and have been playing another precision bass I had already owned). Honestly it was one of those Christmas impulse purchases that I should not have made. I don't need 2 basses.

Gig bag has never been "gigged" or used since I received the guitar. It still has the tag on it. Hex wrenches are in the bag.

Oh, it also comes with strap locks.


A rare item on Reverb it seems.

Official Description

The Aerodyne Special Series offers a contemporary take on classic Fender® designs. Distinctive aerodynamic lines, custom voiced pickups, state-of-the-art hardware, dazzling finishes, and unmistakable silhouettes combine to create instruments that are pure, purposeful, instantly familiar and radically new.

The Aerodyne Special Precision Bass® features a sleek new look with vibrant colors adorning the elegantly bound basswood body and the matching headcap. A modern “C” shape satin finished neck with 12” radius fingerboard ensures effortless playability, while newly designed vintage-voiced Precision Bass pickups and a Babicz® Z-Series FCH-4 bridge deliver a perfect balance of high-performance and classic Fender tone.

The made-in-Japan Aerodyne Special Precision Bass® inspires with futuristic style, premium appointments and exceptional tone. The bold and original designs that inspired generations live on in the Aerodyne Special series.

Body: Basswood
Body Finish: Gloss Polyester
Body Binding: 1-Ply Black
Body Shape: Precision Bass®
Control Knobs: Knurled Flat-Top
Fingerboard: Rosewood
Hardware Finish: Chrome
Position Inlays: White Pearloid Dot
Neck Finish: Satin Polyester with Gloss Polyester Headstock Face
Neck Construction: 4-Bolt
Side Dots: White
Headstock: Precision Bass®
String Nut: Synthetic Bone
Middle Pickup: Aerodyne® Special Precision Bass®
Controls: Master Volume, Master Tone
Pickup Switching: None
Pickup Configuration: Split Single-Coil
Bridge: Babicz® Z-Series FCH-4 Bass
Tuning Machines: Standard Open-Gear
Case/Gig Bag: Included: Deluxe Gig Bag
Fingerboard Radius: 12" (305 mm)
Fret Size: Medium Jumbo
Neck Material: Maple
Refinement Neck Material: Maple
Number of Frets: 20
Nut Width: 1.625" (41.3 mm)
Scale Length: 34" (864 mm)
Truss Rod: Head Adjust
Weight: 8 lbs 2 oz

item.title: Sire Marcus Miller P7 AWH 2nd Gen- Alder 4-String Bass- 2020 - Antique White 9lbs 1.2oz w/gig bag — $479
item.description:
$479 · Very Good · Murphy's Music

Here we have a pre owned Sire Marcus Miller P7 2nd Gen 4- string electric bass.  Made in Indonesia in 2020.  Antique White gloss finish.   The P7 is a 34" scale bass with a 1.5" nut width and a 9.5" fingerboard radius.  P/J pickup configuration with an active/passive  Heritage 3 preamp.  Solid Alder body, bolt- on Maple neck, and an Ebony fingerboard with block inlays.  Tortoise pickguard and nickel hardware all around.  This bass weighs 9lbs 1.2oz.  It comes with a Sire gig bag.  
This bass has just been setup with D'Addario 45-100 strings and is playing great.   The neck is nice and straight and the truss rod is working perfectly with good travel in either direction.  The frets are in very good condition with very minimal signs of wear.  This bass plays cleanly up and down the fingerboard.  
Cosmetically, this bass is in very good to excellent condition.  The gloss finish is vibrant.  There are some light surface swirls in the pickguard.  There are a few very small marks in the finish.  Some light wear on the pickup covers. Nothing major at all. Very well taken care of and in clean shape.   The gig bag is in great shape with all zippers working nicely.  
The Sire P7 is a great mid- level instrument with top notch electronics.  Setup and ready for a new home.  Add this one to your collection today.  Thanks for looking and happy buying!

From Sire site....
Body

Body Material: North American Alder
Body Shape: Sire P Type
Body Color: TS (Tobacco Sunburst), AWH (Antique White), BK (Black), DRD(Dakota Red), D.Navy(Dark Navy)

NECK

Neck Material: Hard Maple (Satin Finish)
Neck Shape: C-Shape
Scale: 34"
Fingerboard Material: Ebony (TS, AWH, BK) and Hard Maple (DRD, D.Navy) Edgeless™ (Rolled Fretboard Edges)
Fingerboard Radius: 9.5"
Frets: 2.4 mm Medium
String Nut: Bone Nut, 38mm width
Binding: 1 Ply Ivory
Inlay: White Pearloid Block
Neck Joint: Four Bolt Steel Square Plate

ELECTRONICS

Pickups: Marcus Super-PJ Revolution Set
Preamp: Marcus Heritage- 3 with Middle Frequency Control
Controls: Volume / Tone (Dual Pot) | Pickup Blender | Treble | Middle / Middle Frequency (Dual Pot) | Bass, Mini Toggle (Active / Passive)
Knobs: Chrome Metal Knob 

HARDWARE

Bridge: Marcus Miller Modern - S
Tuning Gear: Premium Open-Gear
Hardware Finish: Chrome
Pick guard: Tortoise



                           We ship via Fedex ground, UPS, or USPS and insurance is always included in shipping.  

 Payments must be made within 48 hours of Sale/Auction's end.

Feel free to send a message if you have any questions. We are a full service music store in Melville, Long Island, NY. Hours- Mon-Thursday 11am-8pm Friday + Saturday 11am-6pm

                                           GOOD LUCK AND HAPPY BUYING!!!

item.title: Fender American Vintage '62 Jazz Bass 1998 — $2,742.48
item.description:
$2,742.48 · Very Good · Agustin's Gear Locker

Fender Jazz Bass AVRI '62

Made in U.S.A. (November of 1998)

Body: Alder

Neck: Rosewood

Pick-ups: American Vintage Single-Coil Jazz Bass

-Stacked knobs circuit

-Nitro finish


A beautiful 25+ year old example of the most sought after model of the American Vintage series.

-Great shape. The only paint detail is the one in the last picture and a few light scuffs.

-Original tweed hardcase included (with some signs of use)

-Recently adjusted by professional luthier.

item.title: Fender American Professional ll Jazz Basd 2023 - Ocean Blue — $1,000
item.description:
$1,000 · Excellent · Michael's Gear & Stuff

Never been out of the house. Stayed in the case.

item.description:
$1,494.95 · Brand New · Tonewood & Courage

 

Fender Mexican Geddy Lee Jazz Bass

Shipping options are available at checkout!

item.title: Cort GB54JJ NAT 4-String Bass 2010s - Natural Glossy — $350
item.description:
$350 · Very Good · John collection outlet

Cort GB54JJ ASH (Natural) – Excellent Condition (9/10)

Cort GB54JJ ASH (Natural) bass guitar in 9/10 condition. It's been well cared for, is fully functional, and plays and sounds fantastic. Everything works perfectly with only minor signs of normal use.

Specifications:

- Made in Indonesia

- Bolt-On Construction

- Swamp Ash Body

- Natural Finish

- Canadian Hard Maple Neck

- Rosewood Fingerboard

- 20 Frets

- 34" Scale Length

- Passive Electronics

- Cort Voiced Tone VTB-ST Pickups

Condition:

- 9/10 overall

- Everything works perfectly

- Minor signs of normal use only

Included:

- Soft gig bag

If you're looking for a versatile, high-quality, and great-looking bass with classic Jazz Bass tone, excellent playability, and outstanding value, this is an excellent choice. The Swamp Ash body delivers clear, punchy tones with great definition, making it suitable for a wide range of musical styles.

Feel free to message me if you have any questions or would like more photos.

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man USA Classic Sterling 4H Bass Guitar 2012 Lake Tahoe Blue w/Hard Case — $1,899
item.description:
$1,899 · Excellent · Music Makers

This 2012 Ernie Ball Music Man USA Classic Sterling 4H in Lake Tahoe Blue seamlessly blends retro aesthetic appeal with modern tonal versatility. Featuring a select ash body paired with a gorgeous figured maple neck and fingerboard, this instrument captures a timeless vibe enhanced by its vibrant, glossy Lake Tahoe Blue finish. The heart of its powerful sound lies in the single Music Man humbucker with Alnico magnets, coupled with a 2-band active EQ that delivers everything from punchy, aggressive mids to warm, deep lows. Its timeless body shape and chrome-plated hardware—including a classic bridge with adjustable mute pads—provide exceptional playing comfort and vintage styling, making it a highly collectible and gig-ready powerhouse for any bassist.

Notes:

This 2012 Ernie Ball Music Man USA Classic Sterling 4H Bass Guitar is in Excellent condition, part of a single-owner, climate controlled collection, with extremely light wear (pictured) consistent with age and only the most occasional home use. Includes original hard case.

All instruments from Music Makers are professionally evaluated and set-up in our historic Galesburg, IL. storefront prior to shipping.

Questions? Send us a message!

item.title: Bass Mods Jazz Bass K634 2010 - Spalted Maple Top — $2,250
item.description:
$2,250 · Excellent · Jason's Shop

Up for your consideration is a 2010 Bass Mods K634 jazz bass.In like new condition offering the punch,clarity,and low end modern-day players except and need for all styles.This bass is 11 lbs on my scale.It has a custom carved marine brass nut,active electronics,and clear pickguard to show off the spalted top.18mm neck 19mm at the bridge,2 9v batteries.Classic jazz sound but punchy and powerful.I don't play it much using Status bass for travel.This bass has been professionally used and maintained.Soft case included,needs to be played.Don't miss out.Continental US sales ONLY.No Trades or returns.

item.title: Fender American Professional II Precision Bass with Rosewood Fretboard 2020 - Present - 3-Color Sunburst — $1,195
item.description:
$1,195 · Excellent · Michael's Gear Garage

Literally like new. Noodled a bit on it; love it; but never reach for a p-bass over my j’s.


Action is incredible. Best feeling fretboard and neck on a US Fender I’ve ever encountered.

item.title: Fender American Standard Precision Bass 1995 - 3-Tone Sunburst — $1,399
item.description:
$1,399 · Excellent · The Bass Shop

Product details:

This is a virtual "time capsule" bass. Bought new in 1995, this bass has had very little playing time on it. All aspects work perfectly and there's plenty of fret life on a very straight neck. Include original case with case candy.

WEIGHT:  9 lbs. 5 ozs.    

SERIAL #:  N595258 

DATE:  1995

NUT WIDTH:  1 5/8"    

COLOR:  3-Tone Sunburst 

BODY/NECK/FINGERBOARD:  Alder/ Maple/ Rosewood

PICKUPS/ELECTRONICS:  Fender Split Humbucker / Passive Vol. Tone     

CONDITION:  Excellent

CASE:  OHSC w/ Case Candy

item.title: Suhr Classic J Vintage 2023 - Olympic White — $2,095
item.description:
$2,095 · Excellent · Michael's Gear Garage

Barely played, unbeatable US-made jazz bass. Alder body, 7.25 rosewood board, maple neck, and gig bag. Strung with Olinto flats. This is the only j-bass you’ll ever need.


- Mike

item.title: Fender Player II Jazz Bass - 3-color Sunburst with Rosewood Fingerboard 2026 — $849.99
item.description:
$849.99 · Brand New · Micarelli Music LLC

Description

Step into the spotlight and experience iconic Fender® sound and style with the Player II Jazz Bass® — a stage-ready bass guitar with contemporary updates to power your performance and inspire your playing.

The Player II Jazz Bass radiates timeless Fender charm, but under the hood, it's primed for today's players. Everything about the neck is designed for fast and fluid playability, from the Modern “C”-profile with silky satin urethane finish on the back to the comfy 9.5”-radius slab rosewood or maple fingerboard with smooth rolled edges and 20 medium jumbo frets. A classic alder body is available in both timeless Fender finishes and never-before-seen colors unearthed from the archives. Player Series Alnico V Single-Coil J bass® pickups offer sweet highs, growling mids and seismic lows that elevate any genre. An adjustable 4-saddle bridge, single-groove steel saddles and open-gear tuners ensure precise tuning stability for the flexibility to explore endless sonic possibilities.

Perfect for crafting your own sound, the Player II Jazz Bass has the looks, tone and feel that only a Fender delivers.

Specifications: 

  • Number of Strings:4
  • Left-/Right-handed:Right-handed
  • Body Shape:Player II Jazz Bass
  • Body Material:Alder
  • Color:3-color Sunburst
  • Body Finish:Gloss Polyester
  • Neck Material:Maple
  • Neck Shape:Modern C
  • Neck Joint:Bolt-on
  • Radius:9.5"
  • Fingerboard Material:Rosewood
  • Fingerboard Inlay:Dots
  • Number of Frets:20
  • Scale Length:34"
  • Nut Width:1.5"
  • Nut Material:Synthetic Bone
  • Bridge/Tailpiece:4-Saddle Bridge with Single-Groove Steel "Barrel" Saddles
  • Tuners:Standard Open-Gear
  • Neck Pickup:Fender Player Series Alnico V Jazz Single-coil
  • Bridge Pickup:Fender Player Series Alnico V Jazz Single-coil
  • Controls:2 x volume, 1 x tone
  • Strings:Fender 7250M, .045-.105
  • Case/Gig Bag:Sold Separately
  • Manufacturer Part Number:0140480500
Weight: 9lbs 1oz 
Includes Full Set Up Before Shipment 
S/N: MX26051247

item.title: Fender Deluxe Active Precision Bass Special with Pau Ferro Fretboard 2017 - Olympic White — $741
item.description:
$741 · Excellent · The Rock Shop

Has flats on it

item.title: Squier Affinity Series Precision Bass PJ w/bag - USED — $150
item.description:
$150 · Very Good · Collar City Guitars - Troy, NY

Used bass in very good condition! Includes softbody Fender bag.

Serial #ICSB23016527 dates this build to April 2023. Weighs in at 8 pounds, 14 ounces.

Collar City Guitars is a Preferred Reverb Seller, buy with confidence!
----------------------------------------------------------
A superb gateway into the time-honored Fender family, the Squier Affinity Series Precision Bass PJ delivers legendary design and quintessential tone for today's aspiring bassist. This P Bass features several player-friendly refinements such as a thin and lightweight body, a slim and comfortable "C"-shaped neck profile and vintage-style open-gear tuning machines for smooth, accurate tuning. Loaded with a Squier split single-coil P Bass neck pickup and a single-coil J Bass bridge pickup for a wide variety of tones, this model is ready to help lay the foundation for any player at any stage.

Specs:

  • Body: Poplar
  • Body Finish: Gloss Polyurethane
  • Body Shape: Precision Bass
  • Bridge: 4-Saddle Standard
  • Bridge Pickup: Ceramic Single-Coil Jazz Bass
  • Color: Black
  • Control Knobs: Knurled Flat-Top
  • Controls: Volume 1. (Neck Pickup), Volume 2. (Bridge Pickup), Master Tone
  • Fingerboard: Maple
  • Fingerboard Radius: 9.5" (241 mm)
  • Fret Size: Medium Jumbo
  • Hardware Finish: Chrome
  • Neck Construction: Bolt-On
  • Neck Finish: Satin Urethane with Gloss Urethane Headstock Face
  • Neck Material: Maple
  • Neck Pickup: Ceramic Split Single-Coil
  • Neck Shape: "C" Shape
  • Number of Frets: 20
  • Nut Material: Synthetic Bone
  • Nut Width: 1.625" (41.3 mm)
  • Orientation: Right-Hand
  • Pickguard: 3-Ply Black
  • Pickup Configuration: PJ
  • Position Inlays: Black Dot
  • Refinement Neck Material: Maple
  • Refinement Neck Shape: C Shape
  • Scale Length: 34" (864 mm)
  • Truss Rods: Head Adjust
  • Tuning Machines: Vintage-Style

item.title: Squier Badtz-Maru Bronco Bass 2006 - 2009 - Black — $1,200
item.description:
$1,200 · Excellent · EB's Guitrar Pedals

Very minor blemishes on headstock.

item.title: Alembic Essence - Emerald Green (1992) — $4,650
item.description:
$4,650 · Excellent · Boney Mulroney's Bass, Bits and Bobs

1992 Alembic Essence 5-String Bass Guitar in Emerald Green

I have way too much stuff. I'm at an age where I am making my cuts on weight alone (well, just about). On that note it is 10.5lbs.

The canned description:

"Discover a masterful blend of craftsmanship and sonic excellence with this 1992 Alembic Essence 5-String Bass Guitar. Renowned for their meticulous attention to detail and premium build quality, Alembic basses are heralded by professional musicians and collectors alike.

Features:

Finish: A striking emerald green hue that not only captures attention but also enhances the guitar’s sophisticated look. The luster of the finish highlights the elegant curves and contours unique to Alembic craftsmanship.

Neck & Fingerboard: Constructed with a super smooth and fast 24-fret ebony fingerboard and a five-piece maple and walnut neck. This combination offers incredible playability and comfort across all five strings.
Body: Premium mahogany body that produces a rich, warm sound. The ergonomic design ensures comfortable playing sessions every time.

Electronics: Signature Alembic active electronics featuring volume, pan, low-pass filter controls, and a Q switch allowing for a versatile range of tones and enhancing any performance.

Condition: This bass is in excellent condition, with minimal wear reflecting its vintage status. It's been professionally set up and maintained, ensuring optimum performance.

Sound: Delivers a deep, resonant tone with clear articulation—ideal whether you’re laying down funky bass lines, rocking hard riffs, or crafting soulful jazz melodies.

This Alembic Essence 5-string bass is a rare treasure combining aesthetics and functionality, perfect for the discerning musician seeking a unique, high-quality instrument.

item.title: Ken Smith Elite 2001 5 Ebony — $9,799
item.description:
$9,799 · Very Good · BAMonBASS Gear Emporium

2001 Ken Smith Elite 5, ebony body wings, maple core, 5 piece maple neck, Smith 9volt pream, OHSC

item.title: Fender Jazz Bass Deluxe 2005 - Black — $918.13
item.description:
$918.13 · Good · Pesky’s Gear

Hey there, i am going to put the condition good because well is a 21 year old bass, is not a closet queen.
Always been played loud and fast, some age wear to it on the back, etc (took pictures of it).
Through time the varnish on the headstock fell, went on some small mods like a brass nut and a gotoh bridge.
Can be shipped with or without hardcase, the case will make the shipping slightly more expensive, if without i could separate the body and neck for a safer/cheaper journey.
No trades allowed, european union sales only

item.title: 1968 Fender Precision Bass Neck — $3,800
item.description:
$3,800 · Excellent · Al' Bass

The 1968 Fender Precision Bass Neck is a vintage and collectible piece made of rosewood and maple materials in a classic brown color. This neck is specifically designed to fit a CBS Fender bass guitar, and includes the original neck plate with the serial number. Neck is stamped 5OCT68B. With its high-quality craftsmanship and iconic Fender branding, this neck is sure to be a valuable addition to any guitar enthusiast's collection

item.title: Fender American Ultra Precision Bass with Maple Fretboard 2021 Arctic Pearl — $1,500
item.description:
$1,500 · Excellent · Bgjersey

Mint condition. Never left the house. Bought, strung with DR black beauties, played for a bit on the couch, and stored as a collectors piece. Comes with original hardshell case and all case candy including certificate of authenticity and tool kit

item.title: 🔥MINT🔥 Ibanez SR300EB Electric Bass Guitar~ Weathered Black~ 3 Band EQ~ 2024! — $389.87
item.description:
$389.87 · Excellent · Chordplay Guitars

🎸 Ibanez SR300EB Bass Guitar~ Weathered Black~ Mint Condition 🎸


‼️ £279.00 REVERB PRICE ‼️


The Ibanez SR300EB has long been one of the best-selling basses in its class, offering exceptional comfort, impressive versatility and professional features at an affordable price. Lightweight, fast-playing and packed with tonal options, it’s equally suited to beginners looking for their first serious bass or experienced players wanting a dependable all-rounder.


Finished in the striking Weathered Black, this example is in mint condition. It has only been played a handful of times at home and presents beautifully throughout with virtually no signs of use.


The slim 5-piece maple and walnut SR neck is one of the most comfortable bass necks on the market, making long playing sessions effortless. Combined with the lightweight nyatoh body, the SR300EB feels perfectly balanced whether you’re rehearsing, recording or performing live.


Tonally, it’s incredibly versatile. The PowerSpan Dual Coil pickups deliver a powerful, articulate sound with excellent clarity across the frequency range, while Ibanez’s active 3-band EQ and Power Tap switching system allow you to move from warm, full-bodied humbucker tones to brighter, more dynamic single-coil-inspired sounds in seconds. Whether you play rock, metal, funk, blues, pop or jazz, the SR300EB has the flexibility to handle it all.


Freshly inspected and professionally checked over by our in-house technician, this bass is ready to play straight away.


Specifications


* Ibanez SR300EB

* Weathered Black finish

* Nyatoh body

* 5-piece Maple/Walnut neck

* SR4 neck profile

* Jatoba fingerboard

* 34” scale length

* 24 Medium frets

* 38mm nut width

* PowerSpan Dual Coil pickups

* Active 3-band EQ

* 3-way Power Tap switch

* Volume control

* Pickup balance control

* Accu-cast B120 bridge

* Cosmo Black hardware


Condition


Mint condition.


* Only played a handful of times at home.

* Presents beautifully throughout.

* Fully checked over and professionally set up by our in-house technician.


Please study all photographs carefully as they form part of the description.


What’s Included


* Ibanez SR300EB Bass Guitar


🎸 Why buy from Chordplay Guitars?


Every used instrument is professionally inspected, cleaned and set up by our in-house technician before sale, so it’s ready to enjoy from the moment it arrives.


🎸 Case & Accessories


Unless otherwise stated, any case or gig bag shown in the photographs is included with the sale. If none is shown, the guitar is supplied without one.


🚚 Fast UK Delivery


We offer FREE next working day UK delivery on orders over £470 (UK Mainland). Every guitar is carefully packed using specialist packaging to ensure it arrives safely.


🏪 Visit Our Store


You’re always welcome to visit our showroom in Darwen, Lancashire. We normally have over 200 guitars in stock, along with amplifiers, pedals and accessories, and we’re open 7 days a week, including Bank Holidays.


🔄 Part Exchange Welcome


Looking to trade your current guitar? We welcome part exchanges and are always interested in quality guitars, amplifiers and effects.


💳 Reserve This Guitar


Secure this guitar today with just a £50 deposit. Get in touch and we’ll happily arrange the rest.


🌍 International Buyers


We’re happy to ship worldwide. Please contact us for an accurate shipping quote before purchasing. Any import duties, taxes or customs charges remain the responsibility of the buyer.


Whether you’re stepping up to your first quality bass or looking for a lightweight, versatile instrument that punches well above its price point, the Ibanez SR300EB is hard to beat. In this condition, it’s a fantastic buy at just £279.00.

item.title: Reverend Mercalli 5 FM - Coffee Burst Flame Maple — $1,100
item.description:
$1,100 · Excellent · C. Will

Brand new bass ordered from Sweetwater a month ago. I love the tone of this thing but the string spacing is a little wide for me and I can't get past that for some reason... I absolutely love the tone and vibe of this beautiful instrument. 34" scale All passive

item.title: Warwick The Alien 5 NT LH five string acoustic bass Left Hand Lefthanded — $1,191.19
item.description:
$1,191.19 · Excellent · -=-=-v-a-m-o-s-i-a-=-=-

LEFT HAND .Very nice left handed Warcwick acoustic bass , in excellent condition, there are 2 versions of the Alien bass.. a cheap rockbass version model and thie expensive version , this is the expensive model that costs 1600 in the shop And is no longer made by Warwick, only the cheaper models are now made, look at the sharp cutaway shape!

item.title: Squier Vintage Modified Jaguar Bass Special - PJ - Active - 2011 - Black - Set Up - — $412.23
item.description:
$412.23 · Very Good · JimmyBaye

This bass has some surface scratching on the rear of the body and other minor aesthetic signs of use as pictured, but otherwise in excellent working order.

This vintage modified series full scale jaguar bass from Squier was produced in the Cort factory in Indonesia to a high standard, a cut above the standard Squier range. It features a PJ pickup array offering versatility and runs on an active circuit resulting in a huge range of sound combinations. Each pickup has a separate volume control and there is also a bass boost and master tone knob.

Prior to sale the bass has benefited from a full clean, fretboard has been cleaned and conditioned, all hardware and electronics have been checked and serviced as necessary. The bass will come set up and intonated ready to play.

Any questions please ask, will be packaged carefully and sent by courier.


Full Description

Features include a sleek offset-waist body and an ultra-slim fast-action neck, with the added one-two punch of a booming split single-coil Precision Bass middle pickup paired with a growling Jazz Bass single-coil bridge pickup and an active bass-boost circuit that adds additional low-end power. Superior tone, smooth playability, great comfort and fantastic value.


Features / Specifcations:

  • Series: Vintage Modified Series
  • Body: Basswood
  • Neck: Maple, C-Shape, (Polyurethane Finish)
  • Fingerboard: Rosewood, 9.5? Radius (241 mm)
  • No. of Frets: 20 Medium Jumbo
  • Pickups: 1 Split Single-Coil Precision Bass® Pickup (Middle), 1 Single-Coil Jazz Bass® Pickup (Bridge)
  • Controls: Volume 1. (Precision Bass® Pickup), Volume 2. (Jazz Bass® Pickup), Bass Boost, Master Tone (Both Pickups)
  • Pickup Switching: None
  • Bridge: Standard 4-Saddle
  • Machine Heads: Standard Open-Gear Tuners
  • Hardware: Chrome
  • Pickguard: 3-Ply Black/White/Black
  • Scale Length: 34" (864 mm)

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe 50's Precision Bass 4-String Bass Guitar White Blonde Finish — $399.95
item.description:
$399.95 · Mint · Morrell Music Co.

This 2025 Squier Classic Vibe 50's Precision Bass 4-String Bass Guitar is used with "used" stamped on the back of the headstock. It is in mint condition and shows no dings, dents, scratches, or any obvious playwear. The bass has been professionally set up and plays great! The neck is straight, the action is low and comfortable, and the frets are in excellent condition. Awesome deal on a great playing and sounding Squier Classic Vibe 50's Precision Bass!



A celebration of the birth of the P Bass® in the early 1950s, the Classic Vibe ‘50s Precision Bass produces massive tone courtesy of its Fender-Designed alnico single-coil pickup. Player-friendly features include a slim, comfortable “C”-shaped neck profile with an easy-playing 9.5”-radius fingerboard and narrow-tall frets as well as a vintage-style bridge with threaded saddles. This throwback Squier model also features 1950s-inspired headstock markings, rich-looking nickel-plated hardware and a slick vintage-tint gloss neck finish for an old-school vibe.

FEATURES:

Solid Pine Body
Gloss White Blonde Finish
Fender Designed Alnico Single Coil Pickup
Master Volume/ Master Tone Controls
4-Saddle Vintage-Style Bridge
Nickel Hardware
Vintage Style Tuning Machines
1-Ply White Pickguard
Knurled Flat Top Control Knobs
Maple Neck
Tinted Gloss Urethane Neck Finish
C Shape Neck Profile
34" Scale Length
Maple Fretboard
9.5" Fretboard Radius
20 Narrow Tall Frets
Bone Nut
1.685" Nut Width
Black Dot Position Markers

item.title: Sterling Ray35ca - Butdt — $675
item.description:
$675 · Very Good · StudioSound4u

The classic sound of the Sterling bass guitar in a 5 string version with Sterling's active electronics on board. Excellent Value!

It's in very good condition and shows only signs of normal use.

Comes with a Gator locking case, with keys, also in very good condition.

I have owned a Ray34 and a Ray4 short scale for some time now and thought that this would be a great addition to my family of basses but... not so.

5 string bass is just not for me.

If you have any questions please ask.

item.title: 1983 Fender USA Precision 4-String Bass Guitar W/ All Original Components & OHSC — $1,994.99
item.description:
$1,994.99 · Very Good · Vintage Emporium

How's it going! You're looking at a 1983 Fender USA Precision 4-String Bass Guitar W/ All Original Components & OHSC!


Made in 1983 in Fender's legendary Fullerton, California factory, this transitional-era P-bass captures a highly sought-after chapter in Fender's history, combining classic vintage thump with exceptional early-80s build quality. The bass features a wide but thin "C" shaped neck profile that offers a traditional, spacious 1.75-inch nut width while maintaining a remarkably shallow and flat depth from front to back. This unique combination provides a comfortable anchor for your fretting hand, reducing fatigue and allowing for fast, effortless movement across the maple fretboard. Sonically, this Precision Bass delivers a massive, punchy midrange growl combined with a deep, organic low-end thump that effortlessly carves through any live or studio mix. The split single-coil pickup yields a hot, articulate attack, while the all-maple neck adds a crisp, immediate snap to the front of every note, giving the instrument an incredibly versatile range that transitions from an aggressive rock bite to a warm, pillowy vintage purr with a simple turn of the tone knob. Cosmetically, this bass shows honest playwear from previous use, including minor scratches around the body and a small chip in the finish on the left side, but it remains in great shape for an instrument made over 40 years ago (see photos provided). All of the original electronics are in perfect working order, the neck is straight, and the truss rod functions smoothly. The intonation is spot on, the action is excellent, and there is little to no apparent fret wear. Professionally set up with fresh strings, this highly resonant bass weighs in at a very comfortable 7 pounds, 14 ounces. This bass also comes with its original hard shell case. Don't miss out on the opportunity to own this all original Fender Precision Bass!!!


The listed shipping policy ships predominantly to 48 states (Alaska & Hawaii are excluded). However, if you are in either of the Excluded States, any US Territories, or an International buyer from anywhere else in the world- Please inquire if you want to purchase the listed item above. We DO ship worldwide, but if you are not in the 48 States, our listed shipping price is subject to change. We get good rates and can give you a shipping quote! Feel free to reach out to us and we'll work something out!


Thanks for looking! Please check out our store for more great deals and cool finds!

item.title: Fender Special Edition Ash Jazz Bass -2015 -MIM- Natural Gloss w/Aguilar HC pickups + SKB hard case — $799
item.description:
$799 · Excellent · Murphy's Music

Here we have a pre owned Fender Special Edition 4- string Jazz Bass.   Made in Mexico in 2015.  Natural Gloss finish over an Ash body.  Maple neck with a Pau Ferro fingerboard.  4- ply tortoise pickguard.  Chrome hardware all around.  1.5" nut width with a 9.5" fingerboard radius. This bass has been upgraded with Aguilar HC (hum cancelling) pickups.  (originals not included) Schaller strap locks are installed as well. The strap side locks are in the case. Hook up your favorite strap and you are ready to go.  This bass weighs 8lbs 13oz.  It comes with an SKB molded plastic hard shell case.  
This bass has just been setup with 45-100 GHS strings.  The neck is straight and the truss rod is working perfectly.  Good travel in both directions.   The frets are in great shape with minimal signs of play wear.  This bass plays cleanly up and down the fingerboard with no issues.  
Cosmetically, this bass is in excellent condition.  There are some light marks and small indents on the finish. There are some small marks at the top of the headstock.  Nothing major at all. The pickguard has some pick swirls and such.  Truly very very clean shape.  The SKB case is in very good condition with all latches and hinges working perfectly. 
All in all, this Jazz bass is setup and ready to go.  It plays and sounds fantastic.  Add this one to your arsenal today. Thanks for looking and happy buying!


                           We ship via Fedex ground, UPS, or USPS and insurance is always included in shipping.  

 Payments must be made within 48 hours of Sale/Auction's end.

Feel free to send a message if you have any questions. We are a full service music store in Melville, Long Island, NY. Hours- Mon-Thursday 11am-8pm Friday + Saturday 11am-6pm

                                           GOOD LUCK AND HAPPY BUYING!!!

item.title: Bohemian Oil Can Bass Guitar ~ Hot Sauce BGB15HS — $223.58
item.description:
$223.58 · Excellent · Gareth's Gear Outlet

Bohemian Oil Can Bass Guitar in the Hot Sauce finish — a genuinely unique instrument built from a recycled metal hollow body (styled after the improvised tin-can guitars of South Africa), with a maple through-neck for a distinctive, open, resonant tone unlike a standard bass.

  • Model: Bohemian Guitars Oil Can Bass ~ Hot Sauce (BGB15HS)
  • Body: Recycled metal hollow "oil can" body with removable back panel, basswood internal frame
  • Neck: Maple, Bohemian through-body design
  • Condition: Excellent, like new — no dings, dents, or wear
  • All original hardware and electronics, no modifications
  • No case or gig bag included — guitar only
  • Smoke-free, pet-free home

A genuinely eye-catching, conversation-starting instrument with a tone you won't get from a standard bass. Bohemian's oil-can range has become increasingly hard to find new, so this is a great chance to pick one up in excellent condition.

Happy to answer questions or provide extra photos on request. Local pickup welcome or shipped securely, well packaged.

item.title: Fender USA Geddy Lee Jazz Bass 2026 - Black / 9lbs. 9.6oz. / #US26046197 — $2,499.99
item.description:
$2,499.99 · Brand New · Musician's Warehouse Athens

We are proud to be a Fender Premium Showcase Dealer. This item is brand new with the Fender factory warranty. You are looking at pictures of the actual instrument you'll be receiving.
Thank you for visiting our shop and we look forward to being your Fender Premium Showcase Dealer.

Bassists have loved playing and hearing the signature Geddy Lee Jazz Bass for years. The U.S.A. Geddy Lee Jazz Bass is a unique instrument combining the features and specifications of Lee's three favorite basses - two Fender Custom Shop versions of his signature model and his original sleek '72 Jazz Bass - that Rush's revered bassist/vocalist has riffed away on before millions of devoted fans worldwide and on many mega-selling albums.

Features

  • One-piece maple neck with custom thicker profile
  • 9.5"-radius maple fingerboard with 20 medium jumbo frets
  • White binding and white pearloid block inlays
  • Dual vintage-style single-coil custom Jazz Bass pickups
  • Antique white pearloid pickguard
  • Geddy Lee signature HiMass bridge
  • Vintage-style reverse tuning machines

item.title: Warwick Thumb BO 5 2002 — $3,457.91
item.description:
$3,457.91 · Very Good · Emilio's Gear Depot

Made in Germany at the Warwick shop in Markneukirchen, Germany and dating to July 2, 2002, this Warwick Thumb BO is a 5-string bass made of Ovangkol with a curved body and oiled finish. It features black hardware, active electronics, and a solid 5-saddle bridge. It is in overall quite good and original condition, with just a light scuff on the back near the upper horn.

For construction, the body is of Ovangkol, a wood with some visual similarities to Rosewood, and native to tropical western Africa. The body style is a double cutaway with a very comfortable curved body design likely drawn from 1980’s work by Stuart Spector. The neck is also Ovangkol, with an ebony fingerboard and headplate. A pair of MEC Active Metal Cover J-Bass Pickups are installed.

Founded in 1982 in Erlangen, Bavaria, Warwick is well known for its high-end basses and amplifiers. In 1995, they moved to their present location and also revived the historic Framus line of guitars.

item.title: Ibanez BTB605MLM PWM Pearl White Matte - Basso elettrico a 5 corde — $1,476.11
item.description:
$1,476.11 · Brand New · E-Musicstore Strumenti Musicali Forli'


  • Corpo: okumè

  • Manico passante in 5 pezzi: acero/noce

  • Tastiera: acero

  • Raggio della tastiera: 400 mm (15,75")

  • Dot inlays: abalone

  • Lunghezza della scala: 889 mm (35")

  • Larghezza del capotasto: 47 mm (1,85")

  • Preamplificatore: Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-Band EQ

  • Selettore a 3 vie per le frequenze medie

  • Ponte: MR5

  • Meccaniche: Ibanez

  • Hardware: dorato

  • Colore: Pearl White opaco

item.title: 1964 Fender Jazz Bass - Candy Apple Red *Body Refinished* — $16,999.99
item.description:
$16,999.99 · Good · Woodsy's Music

This 1964 Fender Jazz Bass is in good shape with all original electronics, most of the original hardware, and original finish on the neck and headstock. The body has been refinished, and is close to the original color but doesn't quite match the original Candy Apple Red on the headstock. All electronics are confirmed original. All of the hardware is original, but the headstock end pin, pickup cover and bridge cover is missing. The original case is also missing, but a hardshell case is included. This bass weighs 9 lb. 4 oz. Please reach out with any questions here, or call our shop at (330) 673-1525. Shipping rate includes insurance and shipping to lower 48.

item.title: Fender American Professional Classic Precision Bass - Faded Sherwood Green Metallic with Rosewood Fingerboard — $1,599.99
item.description:
$1,599.99 · Brand New · FLORES MUSIC

Fender American Professional Classic Precision Bass - Faded Sherwood Green Metallic with Rosewood Fingerboard

Brand New !


Features:

  • Iconic style and vintage-inspired panache meet modern playability in a refreshed, US-built P Bass
  • Alder body anchors deep in balanced, punchy, sustaining sound with added midrange punch
  • Maple neck adds transparency, brightness, and natural note-separating capabilities to your palette for warm, articulate tones
  • Rosewood fretboard adds crystalline warmth and potent presence without sacrificing clarity
  • Fender Coastline ’60 Precision Bass split-coil pickup fuses classic character with contemporary heat — the best of both worlds
  • Greasebucket tone circuit preserves your low-end power and definition, while shaving off disruptive highs and preventing muddy tones
  • Modern “C” neck profile is satin-finished for balancing speed, control, and precision, with the satisfying tactility of robust in-hand heft
  • 20 frets, 34-in. scale, and 9.5-in. fretboard radius accommodate players of virtually every style
  • Vintage-inspired Lollipop tuners marry rare, historic style with rock-solid stability
  • Classic 4-saddle bridge and synthetic bone nut mean reliable buzz-free tones are always on tap


Tech Specs

  • Number of Strings:4
  • Left-/Right-handed:Right-handed
  • Body Shape:Precision
  • Body Material:Alder
  • Color:Faded Sherwood Green
  • Body Finish:Gloss Urethane
  • Neck Material:Maple
  • Neck Shape:Modern C
  • Neck Joint:Bolt-on
  • Radius:9.5"
  • Fingerboard Material:Rosewood
  • Fingerboard Inlay:Dots
  • Number of Frets:20
  • Scale Length:34"
  • Scale Length Type:Standard-scale
  • Nut Material:Synthetic Bone
  • Tuners:Vintage-Style Lollipop
  • Middle Pickup:Fender Coastline '60 Split Single-Coil
  • Controls:2 x Volume, 1 x Mater Tone
  • Strings:Fender 7250M, .045-.105
  • Case/Gig Bag:Gig Bag

item.title: Sugi Night Breeze 4-String Bass – Transparent Red – Handcrafted in Japan (F6) (20137) — $3,199
item.description:
$3,199 · Excellent · Franklin Guitar Works

Weight - 9lb 5oz

Up for sale is a Sugi Night Breeze 4-String Bass – Transparent Red – Handcrafted in Japan. This one came to us in great shape and plays fantastic, if you know you know! The electronics have been play tested and are working as they should. This one has been played and shows some light signs of previous ownership. There is some light scratching and some light tarnishing on the gold bridge from not being wiped down after use. Overall this bass is in excellent condition and you don't see these often. This one comes with the original Sugi gig bag and strap locks.

Handcrafted in Japan, Sugi instruments are renowned for their exceptional craftsmanship, premium tonewoods, and boutique-level attention to detail. This Night Breeze is no exception, offering outstanding playability, rich tone, and impeccable build quality.

Whether you're playing jazz, funk, rock, fusion, or session work, this bass delivers articulate lows, focused mids, and excellent note definition with effortless playability.

Features

  • Transparent Red finish

  • Handcrafted in Japan

  • 4-string electric bass

  • Premium tonewoods and boutique construction

  • Comfortable, fast-playing neck

  • High-quality electronics for clear, dynamic response

  • Exceptional fit and finish throughout

  • Gotoh 404SBO-4 Bridge

  • Swamp Ash body

  • Neck Side : Sugi Original Single coil WJ4/N Normal Power
    Bridge Side : Sugi Original Single coil WJ4/B Normal Power


SKU:REV871488


Franklin Guitar Works - Who We Are
FGW is a division of MIRC, LLC (Musical Instrument Reclamation Company), located in La Vergne, TN.  MIRC is the world’s largest refurbisher of stringed instruments.  We partner with the leading manufacturers in the industry, helping them recondition their distressed instruments. All of our instruments have been inspected, set up, and refurbished by our certified technicians to ensure you are receiving a quality instrument.

Hours of Operation
Our online Business hours are Monday - Friday 7:30 am to 4:00 pm CST. Closed on weekends and holidays.

Shipping Policy
Free ground shipping within the continental USA. Items under $20 will have a $9.95 shipping charge. We do not offer international shipping.
We cannot ship to a PO Box. Orders require a physical mailing address to be processed.
All orders over $500 will be shipped with a direct Signature Requirement to ensure it is received. If the signature requirement is refused, the customer will assume responsibility for the package once it reaches the delivery address.

Orders are processed Monday through Friday, 7:30am - 4:00pm CST. Shipments are prepared in the order that they are received. We make every effort to expedite orders as quickly as possible, but we cannot guarantee ship dates. Please allow up to 3 business days for tracking information. 

Thank you for trusting us with your business.

item.title: Spector 2001 Q4 Pro 4 String Bass w/ Hard-shell Case Perfect Condition! — $750
item.description:
$750 · Excellent · Cardinal & Crane Guitar & Coffee Company

Spector 2001 Q4 Pro 4-string bass in excellent condition, built for powerful, punchy tone and fast playability. Featuring a solid-feeling NS-style body with a striking quilt/maple top, a comfortable 34" neck with smooth rosewood fingerboard, and dual humbucking pickups for thick lows, clear mids, and plenty of output. Comes with passive tone shaping for easy dialing in from modern growl to classic warmth.

If you’re looking for a stage-ready Spector with serious attitude, this Q4 Pro delivers—clean sound, solid hardware, and a great look.

Brand New Condition, ships with Hard Case.


15% Restocking Fee.


All items will ship in 3 business days. We discount shipping for multiple items. If you do need an item rushed, please contact me and I will try my best to accommodate you based on your schedule. Please feel free to contact me with any questions. I take great care to document all flaws in items and go overboard with shipping to make sure items get sent to you in the condition described. Thank you!

item.title: Fender Precision Bass Project 1974 1975 Neck - Natural! Read Description! — $875
item.description:
$875 · Non Functioning · Vintage loverS

This bass has the following:

1974 - 1975 Precision bass neck - that needs work - non functional at the moment.

1975 Neck Plate

1974 Precision Pickguard that was altered with an older piece at the jack area (see pictures). Solid as a rock.

Vintage Body (unknown year) Sounds beautiful and works great with the neck.

The neck had new frets and brass nut - it will need work - so only buy this bass if you are intended in giving it some more love and TLC - it works fine as is, but I think a fret leveling is in order, and maybe a neck reset.

Truss rod works - but again, will need work.

Bass is very light at the moment, around 6.5 lbs.

Beautiful project with very cool and beautiful parts.


Selling this local as well 6465785027 - Feel free to reach out if you're around LA Area.

Selling more amazing parts from old jazz basses, please check my other listings.


Please ask all questions before bidding, all sales are final, no returns.
Enjoy!

item.title: Ibanez MDM1605-DTW Deep Twilight Basso elettrico a 5 corde — $1,721.50
item.description:
$1,721.50 · Brand New · E-Musicstore Strumenti Musicali Forli'


  • Corpo: Ontano

  • Parte superiore: radica di pioppo

  • Manico avvitato: acero tostato

  • Tastiera: palissandro

  • Intarsi sulla tastiera Dots

  • Raggio della tastiera: 305 mm (12")

  • Scala: 864 mm (34,02")

  • Dado: Plastica

  • 24 tasti medi

  • Pickup: 2 Delta S5J Humbucker

  • Elettronica: attiva

  • Controlli: Volume, Bilanciatore, Tono Master, Bassi, Medi, Acuti

  • Interruttore di bypass EQ con funzione push/pull

  • interruttore a 3 vie

  • Ponte MR5S

  • Meccaniche Ibanez Aero-Light

  • Hardware nero

  • Corde: D'Addario EXL165 +.130

  • Colore: Crepuscolo profondo

  • Include custodia morbida
